values: The fish stocks have been low and the settlement depends on the catch
A large order from the capital needs filling and the nets came up empty today
The smokehouse is running dry and preserving fish is how we survive the lean months
The fishermen refuse to go out past the reef. We need someone to bring in the catch
The river has been poor this season and the usual spots are giving nothing
We trade fresh fish for grain. No fish means we go without bread
The pond was overfished and needs time to recover but people still need to eat
The nets were damaged in the storm and the replacement nets need a catch to pay for themselves
The cook specifically asked for fresh fish and I am not in a position to refuse
The celebration feast is centered around a fish dish and we have no fish
The crab pots came up empty three days running. Something has changed
We need a supply of fresh catch for the travelers passing through. It is our main trade
The drying racks are empty and the storehouse smells like nothing. That is not a good sign
An herbalist needs specific marine ingredients and the fishermen say it is not worth their time
The old fisher says the waters have moved. New spots need testing and we need the catch regardless
